channel.title: Plugins on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Plugins on Arrans github.io

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, GPT-4 Vision, Mistral, Bing, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, AI model switching, message search, langchain, DALL-E-3, ChatGPT Plugins, OpenAI Functions, Secure Multi-User System, Presets, completely open-source for self-hosting. More features in development

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,300+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool so that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.title: arran4/vlc-xattr-plugin
item.description: A plugin for VLC to add “seen” to the xdg.tags list automatically when ever you watch anything
